channel.title: preactjs/awesome-preact Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: preactjs/awesome-preact May 10th - May 16th, 2021

Contents

Components

Contents

Components

  • Preact Dockstars17 - Simple DnD and touch-enabled Dock for Preact apps.

item.title: preactjs/awesome-preact May 11th - May 17th, 2020

Contents

Example Apps

  • Passwords Fountain - modern & performant password manager interface which works everywhere (Github projectstars60).

item.title: preactjs/awesome-preact Apr 13th - Apr 19th, 2020
item.description:
Contents

Libraries

  • hooked-headstars273 - Hooks to manipulate the <head> section of the DOM. This has a subpackage with core preact support (using preact/hooks).

    • Contents

    Example Apps

  • GHFresh Monitor GitHub repository releases – Prerendering with Preact. Built with Preact Compat, TypeScript, Material-UI and Redux Toolkit. (GitHub Projectstars3).

Example Apps

Components

item.title: preactjs/awesome-preact Feb 10th - Feb 16th, 2020

Contents

Libraries

  • Preact-urql - Use urqlstars5.9k with Preact core + hooks.

item.title: preactjs/awesome-preact Jan 6th - Jan 12th, 2020
item.description:
Contents

Example Apps

  • Play.cash 🎶 (GitHub Projectstars90)
  • Songsterr 🎼 Using Preact X in production since 10.0 alpha
  • BitMidi 🎹 Wayback machine for free MIDI files (GitHub Projectstars427)
  • Ultimate Guitar 🎸speed boosted by Preact.
  • ESBench is built using Preact.
  • BigWebQuiz (GitHub Projectstars107)
  • Nectarine.rocks (GitHub Projectstars49) 🍑
  • OSS.Ninja (GitHub Projectstars144)
  • GuriVR (GitHub Projectstars178)
  • Offline Gallery (GitHub Projectstars91) 🎈
  • Periodic Weather (GitHub Projectstars58) ☀️
  • Rugby News Board (GitHub Project)stars6
  • Preact Gallery an 8KB photo gallery PWA built using Preact.
  • Rainbow Explorer Preact app to translate real life color to digital color (Github projectstars26).
  • YASCC Yet Another SoundCloud Client (Github projectstars30).
  • Journalize 14k offline-capable journaling PWA using preact. (Github projectstars31).
  • Proxx A game of proximity by GoogleChromeLabs using preact. (Github projectstars1.1k).
  • Web Maker An offline and blazing fast frontend playground built using Preact. (Github projectstars1.9k).
  • Intergram A live chat widget linked to your Telegram messenger built using Preact. (Github projectstars1.1k).

Example Apps

item.title: preactjs/awesome-preact Jul 24th - Jul 30th, 2017
item.description:
Contents

Articles

  • Authentication with Auth0
  • Building a Small PWA with Preact and Firebase

    • Contents

    Boilerplates

  • Official Boilerplatestars961 - Ready-to-rock Preact starter project, powered by Webpack.
  • Preact Simple Starterstars63 - PWA Simple Starter with Preact, Preact-mdl and Webpack2.
  • Preact PWAstars507 - PWA focused on raw performance, server side rendering, prerendering, redux, express, rollup.

    • Contents

    Routing

  • Preact Routerstars774 - URL router for Preact.

    • Contents

    Components

  • Preact Compat - Use any React library with Preact (full example).
  • Preact Render To String - Universal rendering.
  • Preact Markup - Render HTML & Custom Elements as JSX & Components.
  • Preact Portal - Render Preact components into (a) SPACE.
  • Preact Richtextarea - Simple HTML editor component.
  • Preact Token Inputstars56 - Text field that tokenizes input, for things like tags.
  • Preact Virtual Liststars198 - Easily render lists with millions of rows (demo).
  • Preact Cycle - Functional-reactive paradigm for Preact.
  • Preact Layout - Small and simple layout library.
  • Preact Socratesstars15 - Preact plugin for Socratesstars575.
  • Preact Flydstars9 - Use flydstars1.5k FRP streams in Preact + JSX.
  • Preact I18nlinestars35 - Integrates the ecosystem around i18n-jsstars8 with Preact via i18nlinestars16.
  • Preact MUI - The MUI CSS Preact library.
  • Preact MDL - Use MDL as Preact components.
  • Preact Photon - Build beautiful desktop UI with photon.
  • Preact Classless Componentstars42 - Create preact components without the class keyword.
  • Preact Hyperscriptstars26 - Hyperscript-like syntax for creating elements.
  • Shallow Comparestars32 - Simplified shouldComponentUpdate helper.
  • Preact Codemodstars38 - Transform your React code to Preact.
  • Preact Helmetstars73 - A document head manager for Preact.
  • Preact Delegatestars17 - Delegate DOM events.
  • Preact No SSRstars7 - Skip Server Side Rendering of Components.

    • Contents

    Testing Utils

  • Preact JSX Chai - JSX assertion testing (no DOM, right in Node).

    • Contents

    Example Apps

  • Colors Appstars92 - PWA for copying values from popular color palettes. Supports HEX, RGB, and HSL formats.
  • Tracksstars14 - PWA for tracking things in general. Gdrive Sync.

    • Contents

    Related Libraries

  • Raxstars7.3k - A universal React-compatible render engine.

item.title: preactjs/awesome-preact Jul 10th - Jul 16th, 2017
item.description:
Contents

  • Testing Utils

    • Contents

    Toolkits

  • Preact CLI PostCSSstars14 - It removes the default postcss config on Preact CLI, so you can use postcss.config.js.

    • Contents

    Testing Utils

  • Preact Render Spystars179 - Render Preact components with access to the produced virtual dom for testing.

item.title: preactjs/awesome-preact Apr 24th - Apr 30th, 2017
item.description:
Contents

  • Related Libraries
  • Community
  • Toolkits
  • Boilerplates
  • Routing
  • Components
  • Articles
  • Example Apps
  • Tips

    • Contents

    Related Libraries

  • Reactstars168.1k - A declarative, efficient, and flexible JavaScript library for building user interfaces.
  • Infernostars14.9k - An extremely fast, React-like JavaScript library for building modern user interfaces.

    • Contents

    Community

  • Stack Overflow
  • Githubstars29k
  • Twitter

    • Contents

    Toolkits

  • nwbstars5.3k - Quick Development with React, Inferno or Preact.

    • Contents

    Components

  • Preact Material Componentsstars537 - Preact wrapper for "Material Components for the web".

item.title: preactjs/awesome-preact Apr 17th - Apr 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Contents

Boilerplates

  • Preact Offline Starterstars385 - Webpack2 boilerplate for building SPA / PWA / offline front-end apps with Preact.
  • TypeScript Preact Starterstars49 - Barebones starter project for Preact with TypeScript.
  • Preact Redux SSR Examplestars30 - Server-side Rendering with Redux Example.

    • Contents

    Components

  • Preact Scroll Headerstars37 - A (800b gzip) header that will show/hide while scrolling for Preact.
  • Preact Progressstars43 - Simple and lightweight (~590 bytes gzip) progress bar component for Preact.

    • Contents

    Example Apps

  • Preact HNstars302 - Demonstration of Preact used to build Hacker News as a PWA.
  • TodoMVCstars87 - TodoMVC done in Preact. Under 6kb and fast.

    • Contents

    Articles

  • The Inner Workings of Virtual DOM
  • Using Preact Instead of React
  • Preact Internals #1: The Easy Parts
  • Preact Internals #2: The Component Model

item.title: preactjs/awesome-preact Apr 10th - Apr 16th, 2017
item.description:
Contents

Articles

  • WTF is JSX
